SQLLite.SQL: DELETE FROM report_map rm WHERE rm.report_queue_id IN ( SELECT ro.report_id FROM report_output ro WHERE ro.ae_event_seq IS NOT NULL AND ro.ae_event_seq = ${param.aeEventSeq} ) AND (rm.legacy_path LIKE '%input' OR rm.legacy_path like '%process')

Security.roles: medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2
